page.content: In Table 1, the PAHs listed include Nap with a rate of recovery of 89–109%, Acl at 107–116%, Ace with 92–113%, Flu at 100–125%, Phe at 93–116%, Ant at 99–123%, F1a with 105–129%, Pyr at 112–101%, BaA at 103–125%, Chr at 87–106%, BbF with 110–116%, BkF at 101–109%, BaP at 90–115%, Ind at 98–109%, and Dah with 90–91%, and Bghi at 104–106%.

page.content: Table 2 presents data on survey recipients, survey respondents, and the MHS patient population, showing for female recipients, N is 111 with 49.1%, respondents N is 44 at 48.9%, and MHS population at 52.4%. For individuals aged ≥55 years, N is 135 with 59.7%, respondents N is 63 at 70.0%, and MHS population at 24.3%. For the Caucasian demographic, N is 191 with 85.7%, respondents N is 73 at 81.1%, and MHS population at 73.6%. Lastly, for those who consented, N is 125 with 55.3%, respondents N is 61 at 67.8%, while the MHS patient population is not specified. This detailed summary encapsulates all relevant data from both tables comprehensively.
